summary: Issue #465 P2-9-3 CallBudgetGovernor: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Pure in-memory per-run Partner HTTP attempt counter with ADR-029 defaults (400 soft / 499 hard), BudgetExhaustedError before 500, retry counting via record_attempt, structured log fields, and documented budget≠partition-complete contract. Seven unit tests pass; no live Partner calls; RateLimiter and migrations untouched; path-disjoint from #463/#464.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: MODULE.md documents public API, caller contract, and RateLimiter coexistence.
criticalFindings.suggestion: No action required — documentation matches module style.

criticalFindings.description: Executor note: implies_partition_complete enforcement deferred to orchestrator (#470); between soft cap and hard limit record_attempt still succeeds if caller ignores should_stop().
criticalFindings.suggestion: Orchestrator must exit at should_stop() and call finish('budget') without mark_complete.

mappings.criterion: after N soft-cap attempts, should_stop() is true
exhausted budget does not imply partition success (document contract)
transient failure + retry increments attempt counter
no live Partner calls in CI
